description: There is no standalone norm3d() function. To normalize a 3D vector to unit length, use trace3d with type(norm). This creates a unit vector in the same direction as the input vector.
utility: Normalize a 3D vector to unit length using trace3d with type(norm)

alternates.description: Creates a unit vector in the direction of V

examples.scenario: Normalize a 3D vector to unit length
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 3, 4, 0)
U = trace3d(G, V, type(norm))

G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 2, 1, 3, c(red))
U = trace3d(G, V, type(norm))
